title: Squirrel-proof Bird Feeder for Small Birds - Jacobi Jayne Squirrel Buster Mini – Pigeon Proof Metal Bird Seed Feeds for Wild Birds – Easy Clean Hanging Bird Feeder for Garden Birds
features: [ Built for Smaller Gardens ] The Squirrel Buster Mini is a compact squirrel proof bird feeder perfect for patios, balconies, or smaller outdoor spaces. Lightweight and easy to hang, it fits neatly into any bird feeders hanging station setup—no fuss, just squirrel-free feeding.

[ Save Seed, Save Money ] Say goodbye to stolen bird food. This squirrel-proof bird seed feeder stops squirrels and large birds from wasting seed. In smaller gardens, the savings add up fast—ideal for those feeding in tighter spaces where every seed counts.

[ Compact but Mighty ] At just 0.6 litres, the Mini still delivers powerful performance. Its patented spring mechanism keeps grey squirrels out while letting small birds in. A true squirrel proof seed feeder that punches above its weight.

[ Easy to Hang ] Designed for simplicity, this hanging bird feeder squirrel proof option takes just seconds to set up. No tools, no adjustments, just hang it up and let the birds come. Great for bird feeders squirrel proof setups in small gardens.

[ Trusted Jacobi Jayne Support ] Includes full Jacobi Jayne bird feeder Lifetime Care. Need help? Just call for UK-based support and spare parts, ideal for busy bird lovers who want peace of mind from their anti squirrel bird feeder investment.
description: Product Description Feed birds, not squirrels - 100% guaranteed Experience the ultimate victory in the battle against pesky squirrels with our revolutionary bird feeder. Designed to outsmart and outwit these determined critters, our feeder ensures that the delightful avian visitors enjoy a feast while squirrels are left empty-handed. How it works Birds can feed freely, but squirrels can't. Their weight pushes down the metal shroud, instantly blocking access to the feeder ports. Chosen as “Best Buy” by a UK leading consumer magazine Choose from eight models to suit every garden Finch, The SB, Plus, Peanut, Mini, Classic, Suet, Evolution We’ll keep you feeding All models come with a five year cover, plus LifetimeCare to keep you feeding long into the future whatever happens.
